title: Chapter Index File Structure
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for chapter index file structure
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Identify the required elements of a chapter index.md file: YAML frontmatter, title, summary, and concepts list
Distinguish required sections from optional elements such as prerequisites and learning objectives in the chapter outline
Trace how frontmatter, section headings, and the concept list nest within the document outline shown in the Mermaid diagram
Construct a valid chapter index.md skeleton for a new textbook chapter following the visualized structure
